features.title: Create harness-sdlc-suite plugin structure
features.description: Create the harness-sdlc-suite plugin directory tree with plugin.json manifest (skills-only, no agents or commands). Move the 5 domain skills (harness-sdlc, harness-ea, harness-ba, harness-sa, harness-ops) from plugins/harness/skills/ to plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/. After completion, plugins/harness/skills/ contains only the harness/ directory.
steps: Verify plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/.claude-plugin/plugin.json exists and is valid JSON with skills-only manifest
Verify plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/ directory exists
Verify all 5 domain skills exist under plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/ (harness-sdlc, harness-ea, harness-ba, harness-sa, harness-ops) with SKILL.md in each
Verify plugins/harness/skills/ contains ONLY the harness/ directory -- no domain skill directories remain
Verify domain skill SKILL.md files are content-identical before and after move
evidence: 01-evaluation.json: All 5 domain skills moved. Core contains only harness/. Git confirms byte-identical renames.

features.title: Create harness-sdlc-suite index skill
features.description: Create plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/harness-sdlc-suite/SKILL.md as the domain registry for software delivery. Contains Domain Profiles table, Domain Skill Routing table, End-to-End Delivery Pipeline diagram, Phase routing table, Domain Skills summary table, Cross-Domain Composability note, and Business Analysis Foundation note.
steps: Verify plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/harness-sdlc-suite/SKILL.md exists
Verify it has YAML frontmatter with skill name and description
Verify it contains the Domain Profiles table with all profiles (software, architecture, business_analysis, solution_architecture, ops)
Verify it contains the Domain Skill Routing table mapping domain_profile to skill name and relative path
Verify it contains the End-to-End Delivery Pipeline phases diagram
Verify it contains the Phase routing table
Verify it contains the Domain Skills summary table
Verify it contains Cross-Domain Composability and Business Analysis Foundation notes
evidence: 01-evaluation.json: All 7 required sections present. YAML frontmatter valid.
features.notes: Grouped with F-001 in Sprint 1. Passed.

features.title: Make core SKILL.md domain-blind
features.description: Remove all named references to specific domain skills from plugins/harness/skills/harness/SKILL.md. Remove Domain Profiles table, Domain Skill Routing section, Domain Skill References section, Delivery Pipeline diagram. Keep profile system definition, domain_profile field docs, custom profile example, authenticity gate, all orchestration logic. Rewrite Runtime Verification Requirement to reference 'the active domain skill' generically.
steps: Verify core SKILL.md has zero mentions of 'harness-sdlc', 'harness-ea', 'harness-ba', 'harness-sa', 'harness-ops' by name
Verify core SKILL.md still documents the profile system abstractly (how profiles work, what '4 criteria' means)
Verify core SKILL.md still contains the custom profile as inline example
Verify core SKILL.md still contains the authenticity gate section
Verify core SKILL.md still contains all orchestration logic (dispatch rules, execution loop, stop conditions)
Verify Domain Profiles table is removed
Verify Domain Skill Routing section is removed
Verify Domain Skill References section is removed
Verify Delivery Pipeline diagram is removed
Verify Runtime Verification Requirement references 'the active domain skill' generically
evidence: 02-evaluation.json: Zero domain skill name references. Profile system, custom profile, authenticity gate, all orchestration preserved. Runtime Verification genericized. All 8 contract checks pass.

features.title: Update marketplace manifest
features.description: Update .claude-plugin/marketplace.json to list two plugins in the plugins[] array: harness (existing, updated) and harness-sdlc-suite (new entry). Both entries include name, source, description, version (2.0.0), author, and metadata.
steps: Verify .claude-plugin/marketplace.json exists and is valid JSON
Verify plugins[] array contains exactly two entries
Verify harness entry has correct source path, description, and version 2.0.0
Verify harness-sdlc-suite entry has correct source path (./plugins/harness-sdlc-suite), description, and version 2.0.0
Verify both entries include name, author, and metadata fields
features.notes: Grouped with F-005 and F-006 in Sprint 3. Small manifest update.

features.title: Update Codex manifest
features.description: Update .codex-plugin/plugin.json: change skills from a single string to an array of two paths (./plugins/harness/skills/ and ./plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/). Update version to 2.0.0. Update description to reflect two-plugin architecture.
steps: Verify .codex-plugin/plugin.json exists and is valid JSON
Verify skills field is an array with two paths
Verify first path is './plugins/harness/skills/'
Verify second path is './plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/'
Verify version is '2.0.0'
Verify description reflects two-plugin architecture
features.notes: Grouped with F-004 and F-006 in Sprint 3. Small manifest update.

features.title: Update install scripts
features.description: Modify install.sh and install.bat to: create target directories for all domain skills under .claude/skills/, copy core skill from plugins/harness/skills/harness/ (existing), copy domain skills from plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/ (new), support --uninstall for both plugin trees, maintain existing hooks merge and agents/commands copy behavior.
steps: Verify install.sh copies core skill from plugins/harness/skills/harness/
Verify install.sh copies domain skills from plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/skills/
Verify install.sh creates directories for all domain skills under .claude/skills/
Verify install.sh --uninstall removes skill directories from both plugin trees
Verify install.bat mirrors the same behavior as install.sh
Verify install.bat --uninstall removes skill directories from both plugin trees
Verify existing hooks merge behavior is unchanged
Verify existing agents and commands copy behavior is unchanged (still from core plugin only)
features.notes: Grouped with F-004 and F-005 in Sprint 3.

features.title: Update README
features.description: Update README.md to document: two-plugin architecture overview (core + SDLC suite), updated install commands, updated architecture diagram showing both plugin directory trees, updated Domain Skills table referencing SDLC suite, updated artifact layout, note that core can be used standalone with custom profile.
steps: Verify README.md documents two-plugin architecture overview
Verify README.md has updated install commands mentioning both plugins
Verify README.md has updated architecture diagram showing plugins/harness/ and plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/ trees
Verify README.md has updated Domain Skills table referencing SDLC suite plugin
Verify README.md notes that core harness can be used standalone with custom profile
Verify README.md artifact layout shows plugins/harness-sdlc-suite/
features.notes: Documentation wrap-up. Standalone sprint after all structural changes verified.
